---
title: "OPTT Analysis"
Author: "Oliver Reece"
format: pdf
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
#install.packages("tidyquant")
library("tidyquant")
```

```{r}
#pull OPTT ticker data for all time since going public.
#date format: YYYY-MM-DD

optt <- tq_get("OPTT",
               get = "stock.prices",
               from = "2007-04-25", #went public on NASDAQ April 25th 2007
               to = "2026-06-21") #at time of download, update as needed
```

```{r}
#preview data

head(optt)
```

```{r}
#summary table

summary(optt)
```
